summary: Full Regression Test COMPLETE - 96/96 tests passed (100%). Fixed 1 bug during testing: News model datetime serialization. All 96 endpoints tested across 18 functional areas including Auth/Admin, Public Content, CMS, Intelligence, Packages, Pricing, Calculator, Form Submissions, Smart Home, AI Chatbot, SEO, Admin CRUD, Analytics, Sales Intelligence, and Tracking.

minor.note: PUT update endpoints require full payload (PUT semantics) - not PATCH partial update

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: News model published_date and created_at fields were required but some DB records had datetime objects instead of strings, causing 500 errors on GET /api/news
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Made fields optional and added model_validator to serialize datetime objects to ISO strings

test_categories_covered.auth_admin: 8/8 passed - Login, verify, me, stats, health, version, logs, cache
test_categories_covered.public_content: 14/14 passed - Solutions, services, projects, brands, products, articles, testimonials, videos, news, catalogues, specialty-rooms, locations
test_categories_covered.cms_settings: 4/4 passed - Settings, page_careers, cms sections, admin update CMS
test_categories_covered.intelligence: 5/5 passed - Features, categories, calculate-score, recommend-systems, stats
test_categories_covered.packages_pricing: 12/12 passed - Property types, specialty rooms, enhancements, control systems, brand options, all pricing endpoints
test_categories_covered.form_submissions: 12/12 passed - Consultation, experience centre, contact booking, contact, schedule visit, leads, exit intent, package inquiry, villa designer, contractors, architects, developers
test_categories_covered.smart_home: 6/6 passed - Features, protocols, systems, calculate-package, save-project, book-consultation
test_categories_covered.seo: 6/6 passed - Organization, services, products, FAQ schemas, sitemap, meta
test_categories_covered.admin_crud: 10/10 passed - Full CRUD cycles for solutions, projects, brands, articles, news, videos, testimonials, blog, catalogues, products

critical_code_review_comments: All 96 endpoints tested and working correctly
PUT update endpoints use full replacement semantics (require all fields) - consider adding PATCH for partial updates
News/Video models now handle datetime fields gracefully via model validators
seed_data_creation: Test data prefixed with 'TEST_' and 'test-' created during CRUD testing - automatically cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full regression complete with 96/96 tests passing. All major endpoint categories verified including Auth, Public Content, CMS, Intelligence, Packages, Pricing, Calculator, Forms, Smart Home, AI Chat, SEO, Admin CRUD, Analytics, Sales Intelligence, Tracking, Project Builder, and Health. News model datetime serialization bug was found and fixed during testing. Admin CRUD operations use PUT (full replacement) semantics - tests updated to send full payloads on updates.
